channel.title: Jiachen (Amber) Liu - AI Research Blog
channel.description: Research articles and insights on ML systems, LLM serving, AI agents for science, and machine learning research by Jiachen (Amber) Liu.

item.title: I Built an Auto Research Claw Too. I'm Begging You Not to Trust It.
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Why fully automated research tools can be dangerously misleading, and what responsible AI-assisted research actually looks like.

item.title: Don't Build Another Agent. Build Your Agent Skill.
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Why the future of AI agents is not more agents, but better skills — modular, composable capabilities that agents can learn and share.

item.title: Skill Evolving: What Happens When Agents Learn From Each Other
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Exploring the paradigm of agents that evolve by sharing and learning skills from each other, moving beyond static agent architectures.

item.title: Decoding the DNA of AI Research Innovation
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Analyzing the patterns and traits that drive breakthrough AI research, from problem selection to execution strategies.

item.title: The Rise of AI-Native Researchers
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: How AI is transforming research across literature review, brainstorming, and experimentation. Why people with taste and domain knowledge benefit most from the AI-native research paradigm.

item.title: A Survival Guide for Machine Learning Systems Research
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Practical advice for navigating machine learning systems research — from finding impactful problems to building systems that actually work.

item.title: AI Research Engineering Skills
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: The essential engineering skills needed for modern AI research — bridging the gap between research ideas and working systems.

item.title: Build AI Co-Scientists That Actually Help
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Why fully autonomous AI co-scientists fail in practice, and how to build AI systems that genuinely augment human researchers.

item.title: Agent-Oriented Compute: My Experiment Agent Had a GPU Problem
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: How a GPU allocation problem in an experiment agent led to rethinking compute infrastructure for the age of AI agents.

item.title: When LLMs Grow Hands and Feet: How to Design Agentic RL Systems
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Exploring the shift from chat-based LLM training to agentic RL systems. Why existing RL frameworks fall short for multi-step agent tasks and how a decoupled Agent Layer solves key challenges.

item.title: My PhD Lessons as a ML Systems Researcher
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: PhD lessons and reflections on building user-centric machine learning systems. Insights from research in ML systems, LLM serving, and federated learning at the University of Michigan.

item.title: EXP-Bench: Can AI Conduct AI Research Experiments?
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Introducing EXP-Bench, a benchmark to evaluate AI agents' ability to conduct real AI research experiments — from setting up environments to running and interpreting results.

item.title: Curie: Move Scientific Research at the Speed of Thought
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: Introducing Curie, an AI agent framework that automates scientific experimentation — from hypothesis generation to experiment execution and result interpretation.

item.title: How to Enhance Your LLM Beyond Pre-training
item.dc:creator: Jiachen (Amber) Liu
item.description: A comprehensive guide to unlocking LLM capabilities beyond pre-training through fine-tuning, RAG, and other advanced techniques.
